# Contributing to Daily Driver Workspace

Thank you for your interest! This project welcomes contributions from anyone.

## How to Contribute

1. **Fork** the repository
2. Create a branch: `git checkout -b feature/your-feature-name`
3. Make your changes
4. Commit: `git commit -m "feat: add your feature description"`
5. Push: `git push origin feature/your-feature-name`
6. Open a **Pull Request**

## What We're Looking For

- 🐛 Bug fixes
- 📝 Documentation improvements (especially translations!)
- ✨ New features that align with the "file-based memory" philosophy
- 🌐 Translations to other languages
- 🎨 Demo assets and screenshots

## Guidelines

- Keep it simple — this project values simplicity over complexity
- Test your changes with at least one AI agent (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.)
- Write clear commit messages following [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)

## Reporting Issues

Use [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/colin66611/daily-driver-workspace/issues) to report bugs or request features.

## Code of Conduct

Be kind, be helpful, be respectful. We're all here to build something useful.
